nasb.text: You shall give three cities across the Jordan and three cities in the land of Canaan; they are to be cities of refuge.

esv.text: You shall give three cities beyond the Jordan, and three cities in the land of Canaan, to be cities of refuge.

cnv.text: 在約旦河東面，你們要分出三座城；在迦南地，你們也要分出三座城，都要作避難城。

ccb.text: 三座在约旦河东岸，三座在迦南。
